schema.ion.id › core › identity › v1

core/identity/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/identity/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

IONBusinessIdentity

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/identity/v1#IONBusinessIdentity

PropertyMandatoryDescription
npwpalwaysNomor Pokok Wajib Pajak — 16-digit tax identification number. New format post-2024 (previously 15 digits). Required for
nibalwaysNomor Induk Berusaha — 13-digit business registration number issued by OSS (Online Single Submission). Mandatory for all
nikNumberconditionalNomor Induk Kependudukan — 16-digit national identity number from e-KTP. Required for individual (non-business) sellers.
pkpStatusalwaysPKP = Pengusaha Kena Pajak (VAT-registered, can issue Faktur Pajak). NON_PKP = non-VAT-registered (cannot issue Faktur P
legalEntityNamealwaysRegistered business name as per OSS/notary deed. For PT: "PT Nama Perusahaan Tbk". For UD/CV: "UD Nama Usaha". For indiv
businessTypealwaysLegal entity type. PT=Limited company, CV=Commanditaire Vennootschap, UD=Usaha Dagang, PERORANGAN=Individual.
siupNumberoptionalSurat Izin Usaha Perdagangan — business trade license. Legacy field, being replaced by NIB under OSS but still reference
spPIRTNumberoptionalSP-P-IRT (Surat Pernyataan Pemilik) — small-scale food production license for home industries. Required for UMKM food se

Pack README

ion-core/identity/v1

Indonesian business KYC identifiers and licensing.

Attaches to

`beckn:Provider.providerAttributes` and `beckn:Contract.contractAttributes`

Fields

FieldTypeMandatoryDescription
npwpstring(16)alwaysTax ID — Nomor Pokok Wajib Pajak
nibstring(13)alwaysBusiness registration — Nomor Induk Berusaha
nikNumberstring(16)conditionalNational ID — for individual sellers
pkpStatusenumalwaysVAT registration: PKP or NON_PKP
legalEntityNamestringalwaysRegistered business name
businessTypeenumalwaysPT/CV/UD/PERORANGAN etc.
siupNumberstringoptionalTrade license (legacy, being replaced by NIB)
spPIRTNumberstringoptionalSmall-scale food production license

Regulatory

PMK 136/2023, PP 5/2021, UU 24/2013

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/identity/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
